data.body:
[2.5-Year Anniversary Celebration Gift]

Sensei, please accept our special gift in celebration of Blue Archive's 2.5-Year Anniversary!♥

🗓️Event Period: 5/19 (Sun) 10:00 AM ~ 5/26 (Sun) 2:59 PM (UTC)
